name: Palo Alto Networks Inc
business: Palo Alto Networks is a global cybersecurity provider that delivers platforms and services to secure enterprise users, networks, clouds, and endpoints. Its mission is to be the cybersecurity partner of choice for enterprises, organizations, service providers, and government entities.

exposures.sentence: Our mission is to be the cybersecurity partner of choice for enterprises, organizations, service providers, and government entities to protect our digital way of life.
Our hardware ML-Powered Next-Generation Firewalls (NGFWs) secure on-premises environments including campus locations and data centers.

catalysts.sentence: In July 2025, we also entered into a definitive agreement to acquire Software Ltd. (CyberArk), an identity security company, which acquisition is expected to close during the second half of our fiscal 2026.
